name: Around the World in 80 days: Hidden Objects
short_description: Travel the world with the heroes of Jules Verne! Each location is a new country or continent, brought to life with rich, colorful visuals, regional music, and hidden object challenges cleverly hidden throughout each scene.
detailed_description:
Travel the World with the Heroes of Jules Verne!

Get ready to journey across the globe in a thrilling game inspired by Around the World in 80 Days!

Join Phileas Fogg and his loyal servant Passepartout as they set off from England on an exciting voyage through France, Egypt, India, China, Japan, America, and beyond. But danger follows close behind as Detective Fix is on their trail, convinced that Fogg is a bank thief using the journey as a cover to escape justice.

Explore Breathtaking Locations

Each new scene takes you to a beautifully illustrated country or continent, complete with rich visuals and immersive music that captures the local atmosphere. As you travel, you’ll take on a variety of engaging challenges. Search for hidden objects by name or silhouette, spot subtle differences between scenes, and match identical pairs. You'll also face special logic-based puzzles that add variety to the adventure.

Experience the Full Story

Once you complete the journey as Fogg and Passepartout, you’ll unlock a brand-new perspective by playing as Detective Fix, with an entirely different set of puzzles and challenges. Inspired by the vivid imagination of Jules Verne, this story-driven adventure invites you to step into a world so immersive and believable, you just might forget it’s fiction.

Key Features

  • Travel through vibrant, hand-drawn locations inspired by real-world countries and continents

  • Enjoy regional music that brings each destination’s atmosphere to life

  • Take on classic hidden object scenes, silhouette searches, spot the difference puzzles, and matching games

  • Solve a variety of logic puzzles that add depth and variety to the gameplay

  • Experience the full story as Fogg and Passepartout, then unlock a new adventure as Detective Fix with unique challenges

Your adventure begins now. Pack your curiosity and dive into the journey!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Japanese, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Korean
